name: qwenbridge
description: API compatível com OpenAI que conecta clientes ao Qwen via Playwright, com suporte a múltiplas contas, tool calling e sessões persistentes.

scripts.test: npm run test:mock && npm run test:live
scripts.test:mock: tsx --test src/tests/account-stickiness.test.ts src/tests/accounts-security.test.ts src/tests/advanced.test.ts src/tests/anthropic.test.ts src/tests/auth-playwright.test.ts src/tests/cache-scan-regex.test.ts src/tests/captcha-solver.test.ts src/tests/chat-cleanup.test.ts src/tests/chromium-args.test.ts src/tests/config-current.test.ts src/tests/concurrency.test.ts src/tests/context-summarizer.test.ts src/tests/delta.test.ts src/tests/fingerprint.test.ts src/tests/human-behavior.test.ts src/tests/index.test.ts src/tests/json-recovery.test.ts src/tests/jsonFix.test.ts src/tests/memory-cache.test.ts src/tests/model-alias.test.ts src/tests/model-registry-thinking.test.ts src/tests/models-endpoint.test.ts src/tests/multimodal.test.ts src/tests/oss-upload.test.ts src/tests/parser.test.ts src/tests/payload-summarizer.test.ts src/tests/personalization-flow.test.ts src/tests/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/tests/retry-policy.test.ts src/tests/rotation.test.ts src/tests/server-lifecycle.test.ts src/tests/session-keeper.test.ts src/tests/session-state.test.ts src/tests/single-account-mode.test.ts src/tests/stream-retry.test.ts src/tests/thread-context.test.ts src/tests/tool-calls-endpoint.test.ts src/tests/tool-instructions-cache.test.ts src/tests/session-id.test.ts src/tests/watchdog-ram.test.ts

author: Pedro Farias
